/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/example.dir/example.cpp.o -o /home/poppet/can/Phoenix-Linux-SocketCAN-Example/bin/example  -Wl,-rpath,/home/poppet/can/Phoenix-Linux-SocketCAN-Example/lib/x86-64 /home/poppet/can/Phoenix-Linux-SocketCAN-Example/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_Phoenix.so /home/poppet/can/Phoenix-Linux-SocketCAN-Example/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_PhoenixCCI.so /home/poppet/can/Phoenix-Linux-SocketCAN-Example/lib/x86-64/libCTRE_PhoenixTools.so
